title: Power Bracelets
description: Adds 38+ new powerful bracelets, each with it's own special powers & effects.
body:
Power Bracelets adds 38+ magical bracelets to the game using Curios Api. Each bracelet has its own special powers and effects that are activated when they're worn. The bracelets can be equipped in their special slot in the inventory. These bracelets can be found in the chests located inside a structure called the "ruin temple". The ruined temple can be found in every biome in the overworld. Every bracelet has a unique texture and is displayed on your 3d avatar when worn.

Bracelet list:

Special Bracelets:

  • No Gravity Bracelet - Makes you float in the air at the Y level that you were in when it was equipped;
  • XP Bracelet - Gives you 1 xp every 9 seconds when worn;
  • Flying Bracelet - Gives you creative flight;
  • Magnetic Bracelet - Lets you pick up items and xp orbs from an 8-block range;
  • Ender Bracelet - Makes all endermen ignore you;
  • Golden Bracelet - Makes all pigmen ignore you;
  • Turtle Bracelet - Gives you Resistance III and Slowness IV (Equivalent to the Turtle Master potion);
  • Lucky Bracelet - Gives you luck and immunity to unluck.

Effect Bracelets:

  • Health Boost Bracelet - Gives you 10 more hearts;
  • Regeneration Bracelet;
  • Speedy Bracelet - Gives you Speed I;
  • Hungerless Bracelet - Gives you Saturation IV and immunity to Hunger when worn;
  • Strength Bracelet;
  • Invisibility Bracelet - Makes you completely invisible to other players. Not even potion particles show up;
  • Water Breathing Bracelet;
  • Night Vision Bracelet;
  • Slow Falling Bracelet;
  • Haste Bracelet - Gives you haste 1 or 2 and grants immunity to mining fatigue;
  • Bouncy Bracelet - Gives you Jump Boost III;
  • Dolphin's Grace Bracelet;
  • Glowing Bracelet - Makes you glow, so you can be visible through walls, by giving you the Glowing potion effect;
  • Fire Resistance Bracelet;
  • Resistance Bracelet - Gives you Resistance I;
  • Levitation Bracelet.

Effect Resistance Bracelets:

  • Wither Resistance Bracelet - Gives you immunity to the wither effect;
  • Poison Resistance Bracelet;
  • Slowness Resistance Bracelet;
  • Darkness Resistance Bracelet;
  • Milky Bracelet - Removes all potion effects when worn;
  • Blindness Resistance Bracelet;
  • Bad Omen Resistance Bracelet;
  • Weakness Resistance Bracelet;
  • Nausea Resistance Bracelet.

Prank/Funny Bracelets:

  • Watching Bracelet - Makes all nearby entities look at you;
  • Void Bracelet - Makes you fall through the ground and die in the void.

 

Feel free to add this in your modpack!

 Note: Only the 1.19.x, versions are supported and will receive updates!
